title: Backend: GET /api/admin/deploy/runs and /api/admin/deploy/runs/:id/stream
userStory: As an operator, I want to see deploy history and live-tail an in-progress run so that the upgrade button is not a black box.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/admin/deploy/runs returns last 20 runs (id, started_at, finished_at, status, exit_code, current commit sha)
GET /api/admin/deploy/runs/:id/stream is an SSE endpoint that tails the run's log as new lines are appended; closes when status is no longer 'running'
Verify: trigger a deploy via US-001; the stream endpoint emits log lines in real time and closes on completion

references.name: Coolify log streaming
references.what: Reference for: SSE log-tail pattern that survives the proxied container being part of the deploy.
